DOWNFALL-PURE_WATER.description: At the start of each combat, add 1 [gold]Miracle[/gold] into your hand.
DOWNFALL-PURE_WATER.flavor: Filtered through fine sand and free of impurities.
DOWNFALL-PURE_WATER.title: Pure Water
DOWNFALL-DAMARU.description: At the start of your turn, gain 1 [gold]Mantra[/gold].
DOWNFALL-DAMARU.flavor: The sound of the small drum keeps your mind awake, revealing a path forward.
DOWNFALL-DAMARU.title: Damaru
DOWNFALL-DUALITY.description: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], gain 1 temporary [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
DOWNFALL-DUALITY.flavor: "And the sun was extinguished forever, as if curtains fell before it." - Zoroth
DOWNFALL-DUALITY.title: Duality
DOWNFALL-TEARDROP_LOCKET.flavor: Its owner blind, its contents unseen.
DOWNFALL-TEARDROP_LOCKET.title: Teardrop Locket
DOWNFALL-GOLDEN_EYE.flavor: See into the minds of those nearby, predicting their future moves.
DOWNFALL-GOLDEN_EYE.title: Golden Eye
DOWNFALL-HOLY_WATER.description: Replaces [gold]Pure Water[/gold]. At the start of each combat, add 3 [gold]Miracles[/gold] into your hand.
DOWNFALL-HOLY_WATER.flavor: Collected from a time before the Spire.
DOWNFALL-HOLY_WATER.title: Holy Water
DOWNFALL-VIOLET_LOTUS.description: Whenever you exit [gold]Calm[/gold], gain an additional [gold]Energy[/gold]
DOWNFALL-VIOLET_LOTUS.flavor: The old texts describe that the surface of "mana pools" were littered with these flowers.
DOWNFALL-VIOLET_LOTUS.title: Violet Lotus
DOWNFALL-MELANGE.description: Whenever you shuffle your draw pile, [gold]Scry[/gold] 3.
DOWNFALL-MELANGE.flavor: Mysterious sands from an unknown origin. Smells of cinnamon.
DOWNFALL-MELANGE.title: Melange
SEA_GLASS.DOWNFALL-WATCHER.title: Oracle Glass
